new_terms.context: AMD's next-generation GPU architecture mentioned as a competitor to VR NVL72.
AMD's rack-scale system architecture, equivalent to NVIDIA's NVL series.
A metric representing the ratio of observed throughput to the theoretical peak throughput of a chip.
A specific benchmarking suite used to measure real-world inference token throughput.
A financial metric used to evaluate the profitability of potential investments, agnostic to depreciation periods.
Computing performance measured without the use of sparsity optimizations.
The estimated duration over which an asset is expected to be productive for TCO calculations.
